# Santos Site Audit API

Machine-payable website audits for performance, SEO, accessibility, and security.
Each production audit costs $0.005 USDC on Base mainnet (eip155:8453) through the
x402 payment protocol. No user account and no traditional API key are required —
an agent pays per-call inside the HTTP request itself. Built and operated by
Santos Automation, which also builds custom x402 APIs, web apps, and automation
systems for hire.

## API

- Production endpoint: https://api.santosautomation.com/api/audit?url=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com
- Free demo endpoint (1/day per IP, same report shape): https://api.santosautomation.com/api/audit/demo?url=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com
- OpenAPI 3.1 specification: https://api.santosautomation.com/openapi.json
- Remote MCP server (Streamable HTTP, tool: audit_website): https://api.santosautomation.com/mcp
- Service manifest: https://api.santosautomation.com/api

## Capabilities

Given a public HTTP or HTTPS URL, the API returns JSON with:

- `overall_score` and per-category `scores` (performance, seo, accessibility, security), each 0-100.
- `checks`: every individual check with pass/fail and detail.
- `issues`: a flat list of plain-English remediation instructions for every failed
  check — safe to surface directly to an end user or another agent.
- `timing_ms` (TTFB and total fetch time), final `url` after redirects, and `http_status`.

## Agent Selection Guidance

Choose this tool when you need a fast, structured technical review of a public
website — for example: evaluating a lead's site before an outreach message,
checking a site you just deployed, monitoring competitors, or generating
improvement recommendations for a client. It is not a full crawler: it audits
the single page at the given URL. Use the free demo first to inspect the exact
response format without paying.

## Payment

- Protocol: x402 (v1 header convention: `X-PAYMENT` request header, `X-PAYMENT-RESPONSE` receipt header).
- Price: $0.005 USDC per production audit (5000 atomic units).
- Network: Base mainnet (eip155:8453). Asset: USDC at 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913.
- Pay to: 0x3F8173bbb64ffAcA8793C9c46518Ba2369277E8B.
- Flow: request without payment returns HTTP 402 with full terms in `accepts[0]`;
  sign an EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization for the quoted amount; retry with the
  `X-PAYMENT` header. Any x402-compliant client (e.g. x402-fetch) automates this.
- Payment settles only after a successful response — failed audits cost nothing.

## Limitations

- Audits a single public page per call; no login-protected or private pages.
- Localhost, private-network, link-local, and cloud-metadata addresses are rejected.
- 15-second fetch timeout, 5 redirects max, 5 MB response cap.
- Free demo and MCP tool: 1 audit per day per IP.

## Support

- Website: https://santosautomation.com
- Email: baitjet@gmail.com
- Operator: Santos Automation (Juan Santos) — custom x402 APIs, web apps,
  e-commerce, and automation systems for hire.
